001import java.util.HashMap;
002
003/**
004 * Manages a collection of items, accessible by name.
005 * Used by both Room and Player to avoid code duplication.
006 *
007 * @author Raphaël Quillaud
008 * @version 2026.05.09
009 */
010public class ItemList {
011    private HashMap<String, Item> aItems;
012
013    /**
014     * Creates an empty item list.
015     */
016    public ItemList() {
017        this.aItems = new HashMap<String, Item>();
018    }
019
020    /**
021     * Adds an item to the list, using its lowercase name as key.
022     *
023     * @param pItem the item to add
024     */
025    public void addItem(final Item pItem) {
026        this.aItems.put(pItem.getName().toLowerCase(), pItem);
027    }
028
029    /**
030     * Returns the item with the given name, or null if not found.
031     *
032     * @param pName the name of the item (case-insensitive)
033     * @return the requested item, or null if not found
034     */
035    public Item getItem(final String pName) {
036        return this.aItems.get(pName.toLowerCase());
037    }
038
039    /**
040     * Removes and returns the item with the given name.
041     * Returns null if not found.
042     *
043     * @param pName the name of the item to remove
044     * @return the removed item, or null if not found
045     */
046    public Item removeItem(final String pName) {
047        return this.aItems.remove(pName.toLowerCase());
048    }
049
050    /**
051     * Returns true if the list contains an item with the given name.
052     *
053     * @param pName the name to check
054     * @return true if the item is present, false otherwise
055     */
056    public boolean contains(final String pName) {
057        return this.aItems.containsKey(pName.toLowerCase());
058    }
059
060    /**
061     * Returns true if the list is empty.
062     *
063     * @return true if the list has no items, false otherwise
064     */
065    public boolean isEmpty() {
066        return this.aItems.isEmpty();
067    }
068
069    /**
070     * Returns a string listing all items currently in the list.
071     *
072     * @return a description of the items
073     */
074    public String getItemString() {
075        if (this.aItems.isEmpty()) return "No item here.";
076        StringBuilder vResult = new StringBuilder("Items :");
077        for (Item vItem : this.aItems.values()) {
078            vResult.append("\n- ").append(vItem.getLongDescription());
079        }
080        return vResult.toString();
081    }
082
083    /**
084     * Returns a string listing all items in the inventory.
085     *
086     * @return a description of the inventory
087     */
088    public String getInventoryString() {
089        if (this.aItems.isEmpty()) return "You are not carrying anything.";
090        StringBuilder vResult = new StringBuilder("Inventory :");
091        for (Item vItem : this.aItems.values()) {
092            vResult.append("\n- ").append(vItem.getLongDescription());
093        }
094        return vResult.toString();
095    }
096}
